nasb.text: The righteous cry, and the Lord hears And delivers them out of all their troubles.

esv.text: When the righteous cry for help, the Lord hears and delivers them out of all their troubles.

cnv.text: 義人哀求，耶和華就垂聽， 搭救他們脫離一切患難，

ccb.text: 义人向耶和华呼救，祂就垂听， 拯救他们脱离一切患难。

csbs.text: 义人呼求，耶和华就垂听， 解救他们脱离一切的患难。
